articles.author: Jake Traylor, Soorin Kim
articles.title: America’s 250th: A welcome ‘distraction’ for the White House - MS NOW
articles.description: As U.S. forces trade strikes with Iran, the president has thrown himself into a sprawling, opaquely funded July 4 celebration — one that has begun to swallow the nation’s official, nonpartisan commemoration.
articles.content: In recent weeks, President Donald Trump has waved off the stalled Iran negotiations and the looming midterm elections with a shrug: I dont care, he said during a Cabinet meeting last week. But there … [+7766 chars]
